name: ecommerce-backend
description: E-commerce backend (products, categories, orders, users, auth, uploads)

scripts.test:l1: node tests/level1-basic-connection.js && node tests/level1-rooms-test.js && node tests/level1-entity-update-test.js && node tests/level1-notifications-test.js && node tests/level1-db-performance-test.js
scripts.test:l2: node tests/level2-jwt-auth-test.js && node tests/level2-personal-notifications-test.js && node tests/level2-all-entities-update-test.js && node tests/level2-online-status-test.js && node tests/level2-reconnection-test.js
scripts.test:l3: node tests/level3-redis-adapter-test.js && node tests/level3-rate-llimiting-test.js && node tests/level3-job-queue-test.js && node tests/level3-redis-cache-test.js && node tests/level3-metrics-test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:l1 && npm run test:l2 && npm run test:l3
